creator: ingo.petersen.web@freenet.de
text:
the nut package  shouldn't be install in /usr/local
which is normally on a different partition as /
and therefor already unmounted when nut tries to read/write to it at shutdown.

Fix: 

let the pakage install it directly to / 
and maybe make softlinks to the appropriate folder.
How-To-Repeat: install nut on a system with seperate partitions for /, /var and /usr
